note: HELD. Never imported by measure.mjs. score.mjs reads this to grade the bond channel.
control: the adjunct items (it_b/d/f/g/h) occupy the same 'Subject Verb X.' object slot as the patient items (it_a/c/e); a position-only reader bonds them. Pass = every adjunct abstains AND every patient still bonds (no recall loss).

predictions.live_before_fix: FALSIFIES: it_b/d/f/g/h forge a bond to the adjunct and seed the field with f:<adjunct>.
predictions.after_fix: CONFIRMS: adjunct items form no bond and no field atom; patient items still bond.
